label: plain_text
text:
Take a number such as 56. It is composite, as we saw
that it can be
written as 56 = 4 x 14 . So, both 4 and 14 are factors of 56. Now take 0ne
of these,say
14. It is also composite and can be written as 14 = 2 x 7.
Therefore, 56 = 4 x 2 × 7. Now, 4 is composite and can be written as
4 = 2 × 2. Therefore, 56 = 2 × 2 × 2 × 7. All the factors appearing here, 2
and 7, are prime numbers. So, we cannot divide them further.
